content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from manchu to english:
morin dobori orho be jeterakv oqi tarhvrakv
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

I will attempt to translate the given Manchu phrase to English. Manchu is a Tungusic language, and while it is not commonly spoken today, it was the language of the Manchu people who ruled China during the Qing dynasty. The phrase you provided seems to be about horses or horse-related activities, but please note that my translation might not be entirely accurate due to the complexity and variability of Manchu language structures.

### Riding horses is very enjoyable ###

Please understand that this translation is an approximation based on the words provided and may not capture the exact meaning or nuances of the original Manchu phrase.
